body.title: Fix drain_learn_queue logging — titles not hex hashes, persist to reading_list before drain
body.result: drain_learn_queue.py: (1) flock single-instance guard replacing racy psutil scan, (2) _persist_queue_to_reading_list() INSERTs all pending web URLs to reading_list on startup, (3) _save_slate_file() saves <memoryid>_<label>.txt to ~/TheIgorsProject/akien/Readings/ on startup (D271), (4) --label CLI arg. 567 tests pass.
body.description: drain_learn_queue.py logs hex hashes instead of book titles. Fix: resolve calibre ID or URL to title+author before each log line. Also: write full queued list to reading_list table BEFORE launching drain so list survives if queue.json is wiped.
